description: The InventoryBrowser Component is the component that handles the Inventory screen.

fields.SelectedItem: The currently selected item being highlighted.
fields.AllowSelect: Whether this file browser allows selecting item elements.
fields.ItemSize: How big the items are on the view.
fields._selectedText: The text to fill with the name of the selected item.
fields._pathRoot: The root of the area being used to display the current path.
fields._buttonsRoot: The root of the area being used to show the different button actions.
fields._folderGrid: The grid layout Component being used to align the folders in the directory.
fields._itemGrid: The grid layout Component being used to align the files in the directory.
fields._tabSprite: The sprite being used to show the tab sprite.
fields._loadingIndicator: The slot that stores the loading indicator for a newly opened directory.
fields._swapper: The component to handle the slide animation when opening a different directory.
fields.CustomItemSpawn: The function to use when spawning items instead of the default one.
fields._autoReinitialize: Whether to fix issues by auto reinitializing.
fields._initFunction: The function to run when initalizing.
fields._currentPath: The current inventory path this is navigated to.
fields._currentOwnerId: The owner of this inventory screen.
fields._addNewButton: The button for adding new directories.
fields._deleteButton: The button for deleting items and directories.
fields._inventoriesButton: The button to go to the main inventories screen in order to go to the personal inventory or group shared inventories.
fields._shareButton: The button to share folders to the public.
fields._unshareButton: The button to unshare folders to the public.
fields._copyLink: The button to copy the link for an item or folder.
fields._addCurrentAvatar: The button to favorite the currently selected avatar
fields._lastSpecialItemType: The last special item type that was selected in this inventory.

usage: Not used directly by the user.

notes.title: SpecialItemType
notes.text: Every one of these map to their corrosponding favorite item. To see what components map to these enums when saved to inventory, refer to the favorites page.
